symptoms.symptom_name: Persistent central facial erythema with trigger-provoked flushing (heat/alcohol/sun/spicy food)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Background erythrotelangiectatic rosacea with characteristic vasodilatory triggers underlies the papulopustular flare.
A background of fixed flushing/erythema and telangiectasia is not a feature of acne.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute inflammatory papules and pustules with NO comedones

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Papulopustules without comedones on central erythema is the defining feature of papulopustular rosacea.
The complete absence of comedones effectively excludes acne vulgaris.

symptoms.symptom_name: Prominent facial telangiectasias (thread veins) on video

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Telangiectasia is part of the rosacea phenotype and video-observable, supporting the diagnosis remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Systemically well — afebrile, no rigors or malaise

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of fever/systemic upset makes a spreading soft-tissue infection very unlikely.
A benign inflammatory flare is expected to be systemically silent.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bilateral, symmetrical, non-indurated, non-spreading central erythema without a demarcated border

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Cellulitis is typically unilateral with a hot, indurated, sharply demarcated spreading border — none of which are present.
Symmetrical central distribution is characteristic of rosacea.

symptoms.symptom_name: No ocular symptoms (eyes not red, gritty or painful; vision normal)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Ocular rosacea can accompany cutaneous rosacea; its absence now does not change the diagnosis but is the key safety-net screen.

symptoms.symptom_name: Heavy use of harsh exfoliating scrubs / acid toners (barrier compromise)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A disrupted epidermal barrier from over-exfoliation amplifies rosacea stinging and inflammation and is a modifiable aggravator.
Clinician-confirmed absence of lymphadenopathy further argues against infection — sealed clinician examination finding, not obtainable by the AI Doctor via chat.
